programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: It's an emotional search for Veronica and Bryce this week, with life changing decisions, two challenging searches and a dramatic health scare. We're on the North Coast of New South Wales, looking for two homes amongst the rolling hills around Byron Bay. Bryce is helping Fiona and Ninian, a stressed out professional couple from Sydney. They're desperate for the simpler things in life; slow, lazy days, a veggie patch and even a cow or two. Then there's Dave who wants to get away from his cows! This exhausted dairy farmer from Victoria is worried hard work is ruining his health. He needs Veronica's help to move to retirement and relaxation in Byron Bay. But the fears for his health prove well founded, with a dramatic twist that ups the urgency for David's new home and new life.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Roy is a hoarder. His house is so full you can barely get in the door. The only way to sell this place is to embark on the biggest clean up the team have ever done, but who knows what they'll find underneath.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: When John spotted a supersize block he thought he'd found his ticket to debt-free living. The idea: subdivide, build a house at the back, and sell the one at the front. It may have worked if he hadn't acted on some bad advice.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Natalie wants to swap her North Coburg home of 10 years for the sunnier weather of Queensland. She's over the dated kitchen and odd layout. Will Andrew's Brisbane alternative win against Neale's Melbourne location?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Obstetrician Gary and nurse Clare left the hustle and bustle of Sydney for a more peaceful pace in the lush, rolling hills around Nimbin, NSW. But it wasn't just the rural life they were seeking - Gary had long held plans of building a dome-shaped house, reminiscent of the beautiful vaulted structures he'd seen while travelling through Europe in his younger years. With plans to trial an experimental construction system for their remarkable spaceship-like home they struggle with every step of the project from collapsing access roads to blocked cement trucks! With money running out and the project running over, Gary and Clare's relationship is strained, and hopes for relaxing country hideaway turn into what seems to be the impossible dream!

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil meet Ryan and Graham, who can't agree on what to do about their dinky 17th-century cottage in Surrey.

programme.desc: Dave loves their Victorian villa in Peebles but Amy loathes its impracticality. Kirstie and Phil step in to help decide.

programme.desc: In 2015, traditional builder Paul and his wife Carol set out to create a fortress-like home, but money and time ran out. Now, six years later, Kevin is back to see if this home is finally finished.

programme.desc: David is selling an oddity in beachside Adelaide: a mock Tudor house that's a neighbourhood landmark. It's been on and off the market for five years, and David needs to downsize to a more practical home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The team take on the massive challenge of three homes owned by the same family, and all are up for sale. Will they be able to make the most of a limited budget and find buyers for all three?

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and the team are surprising WW2 veteran Gordon, who at 96 is a surviving hero from the D Day landings. The neglected garden needs to be a space where the family can spend precious time together.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: The Kellys live in Kelly House in Devon, and this historic home is in a sorry state. Ruth persuades the family to set up a training program for students to learn their trade while the house benefits from their work.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Pearse Egan met his father in 2018, but meeting Eddie hasn't been the end of the story. Now Pearse is being visited by Eddie's other son - Pearse's older brother Nick - in London for the first time.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia

programme.desc: Anna and Stuart blue light to the home of a former soldier who has fallen down some stairs and has a potential spinal injury; Jo and Laura treat a teenage boy who is having a seizure at college.

programme.desc: Three Nottingham students arrive after suspected needle spiking, including Kate who collapsed in a club, as staff confront rising cases and the pressures facing young women.

programme.desc: Helicopter rescues by the Yorkshire Air Ambulance.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics rush to help a man who has a single penetrating wound in his back, but doesn't know if he's been shot or stabbed.

programme.title: Davina McCall: Sex, Myths and Menopause
programme.desc: Davina was 44 and felt like she was losing it - hot flushes, depression, mental fog. Now she tells her menopause story, busting midlife taboos from sex to hormone treatment.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny vs Cancer
programme.desc: Forty years after her mother died of breast cancer, Sarah Beeny has been diagnosed with the same disease. Sarah explores the past, present and future of breast cancer treatment.

programme.title: George Clarke's Flipping Fast
programme.desc: The battle to be the first to flip a second property hots up. Early leader Harriet plans a super quick makeover in Bolton, but it's the end of the road for one team who bow out.

programme.desc: The team take on the massive challenge of three homes owned by the same family, and all are up for sale. Will they be able to make the most of a limited budget and find buyers for all three?

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Three Nottingham students arrive after suspected needle spiking, including Kate who collapsed in a club, as staff confront rising cases and the pressures facing young women.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross oversees today's Bargain Hunt from The Royal Welsh Showground in Builth Wells. Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant help the teams spend 300 pounds on three items.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last gallivant for Road Trip pals Margie Cooper and Ochuko Ojiri.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: The Kellys live in Kelly House in Devon, and this historic home is in a sorry state. Ruth persuades the family to set up a training program for students to learn their trade while the house benefits from their work.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a buyer pursue her dream move to North Yorkshire and meets an artist who created a rural retreat for painters.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Twelve of Britain's best home potters compete to become champion as Siobhan McSweeney hosts another series of the program.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Unveils the decisive moment that forever changed media coverage and continues to impact live news today. Set during the 1972 Munich Summer Olympics, an American Sports broadcasting team must quickly adapt from sports reporting to live coverage of the Israeli athletes taken hostage.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. When he finds himself training a detachment of Top Gun graduates for a specialised mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen, Maverick encounters Lt. Bradley Bradshaw, call sign: "Rooster", the son of Maverick's late friend and Radar Intercept Officer Lt. Nick Bradshaw, aka "Goose". Facing an uncertain future and confronting the ghosts of his past, Maverick is drawn into a confrontation with his own deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who will be chosen to fly it.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Jeanne Du Barry
programme.desc: The life of Jeanne Becu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of a seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.title: Get Away
programme.desc: A remote getaway takes an unexpected turn when a family discover the island that they're on is inhabited by a serial killer.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic becomes entangled in a web of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her past.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: As the world fell, young Furiosa is snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers and falls into the hands of a great biker horde led by the warlord Dementus. Sweeping through the Wasteland, they come across the Citadel presided over by The Immortan Joe. While the two tyrants war for dominance, Furiosa must survive many trials as she puts together the means to find her way home.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five former basketball teammates, after 30 years since graduating high school, gather at the lake house where they celebrated their biggest victory to mourn the passing of their late coach. Over the course of the Fourth of July weekend, the five friends realise that just because they've all grown up and started families doesn't mean that they've lost that old spark. Adulthood is what you make of it, and no one at the lake house is eager to be the grown up of the gang.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: You'll never look at warm apple pie the same way again. This film takes a hysterical look at the goal of four unlucky in love high school friends who make the ultimate pact: lose their virginity by prom night. As they try to manipulate their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity. Follow the raging hormones of four teenage boys and their girls as they gear up for the most important night of their lives: the prom.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug and his three friends drive to Las Vegas for a blow-out bachelor party they'll never forget. But, in fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing. For some reason, they find a tiger in the bathroom and a six-month-old baby in the closet of their suite at Caesars Palace. The one thing they can't find is Doug. With no clue as to what transpired and little time to spare, the trio must retrace their hazy steps and all their bad decisions in order to figure out where things went wrong and hopefully get Doug back to LA in time to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: For Jimmy Smith, Jr, life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive. Feeding his dreams in Detroit's vibrant music scene, Jimmy wages an extraordinary personal struggle to find his own voice - and earn a place in a world where rhymes rule, legends are born and every moment, is another chance.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle against the Decepticons, who have returned stronger than ever with a plan to destroy our world.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Made of Honour
programme.desc: Hannah surprises Tom, her best friend who is secretly in love with her, with the news of her engagement. Things take a complicated turn when she asks Tom to be her maid of honour.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A hilarious, heartfelt look at one guy's arduous quest to grow up and get over the heartbreak of being dumped. Struggling musician Peter, after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, runs off to Hawaii on a vacation only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Made of Honour
programme.desc: Hannah surprises Tom, her best friend who is secretly in love with her, with the news of her engagement. Things take a complicated turn when she asks Tom to be her maid of honour.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A hilarious, heartfelt look at one guy's arduous quest to grow up and get over the heartbreak of being dumped. Struggling musician Peter, after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, runs off to Hawaii on a vacation only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: More Sex & the Single Mom
programme.desc: A woman's (Gail O'Grady) life turns chaotic when her ex-lover (Grant Show) returns and her daughter (Chelsea Hobbs) becomes infatuated with an older man.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: Given one weekend to clean out their childhood bedroom before their parents sell their home, two sisters throw one last party.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: A burgeoning relationship between two very different women in 1950s New York. One, a girl in her 20s working in a department store who dreams of a more fulfilling life, and the other, a wife trapped in a loveless, moneyed marriage, desperate to break free.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Tim Lake discovers he can travel in time. The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life - so he decides to make his world a better place ... by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary. They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too. This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Matt Dillon stars as Sam Lombardo, a guidance counsellor at Florida's Blue Bay High School. Denise Richards stars as Kelly Van Ryan, a student who has a crush on him. One afternoon, she comes to his house to wash his car, and, when she leaves, her clothing is torn. After confessing to her mother (Theresa Russell) that she was raped, she goes to the police station, where she tells her story to detectives Ray Duquette (Kevin Bacon) and Gloria Perez (Daphne Rubin-Vega). They are sceptical about here claims until another girl, Suzie Toller (Neve Campbell), comes forward with a similar tale. Meanwhile, Sam, convinced that he's being set up, goes to a shyster lawyer (Bill Murray) for help.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: A burgeoning relationship between two very different women in 1950s New York. One, a girl in her 20s working in a department store who dreams of a more fulfilling life, and the other, a wife trapped in a loveless, moneyed marriage, desperate to break free.

This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Shocking secrets are revealed when a mother is found stabbed to death and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals continue to baffle police by pulling off perfectly executed bank robberies. They are in and out like clockwork, leaving no evidence behind and laying low in between heists. But when they attempt to pull off one last job with more money at stake than ever before, the crew may find their plans interrupted by a hardened detective who is hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Shocking secrets are revealed when a mother is found stabbed to death and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 1
programme.desc: Lars Von Trier's Nymphomaniac is the wild and poetic two-part story of a woman's journey from birth to the age of fifty.

programme.desc: Aussie young gun Georgia Voll joins the Bangalore attack to take on the defending champions in the season opener.

programme.desc: With Aussie Test stars returning this weekend, the Hurricanes aim to cement their spot atop the BBL ladder.

programme.desc: Even after the final ball is bowled the fun doesn't stop! Join the Fox Cricket team for an in-depth wrap up of all the Big Bash action, plus latest news and stories on everything cricket.

programme.desc: Alyssa Healy, Alana King, Beth Mooney and more relive the historic 16-0 Women's Ashes whitewash of England.

programme.title: Ashes
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: Travball, Bazball and the King of the pink ball Mitchell Starc head to the Gabba with Australia 1-0 up in the series.

programme.title: Test Day
programme.desc: Skipper Pat Cummins returns with the Aussies 2-0 up and looking to clench the Ashes as the series moves to Adelaide.

programme.title: Test Day
programme.desc: Australia and England go to battle on cricket's biggest stage - the Boxing Day Test at the MCG.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2004, Round 11. Essendon and the Hawks have hated each other for generations. But the now infamous 'Line in the Sand' game would stoke the fire for years to come. This is unrelenting, unapologetic, unsociable footy.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1977 Grand Final. The Roos and the Pies play out one of the most memorable Grand Finals in history.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1998, Round 22. The 'King' Wayne Carey is arguably the best to have ever played - and he shows us why in this game against the Dogs, in a last quarter that has to be seen to be believed.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2013, Round 19. The Showdowns between Adelaide and Port Adelaide are essential viewing every year, but this one is right up there with the best, including a goal - and a finish - that lived on long after the final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1979 Grand Final. Any time you get the Pies and the Blues in a big game you can bet there will be fireworks, but throw them both into a Grand Final and you get something else entirely.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2000 Round 21. The WA Derby looks a fizzer when the Eagles go 42 points up, until Dale Kickett fires up and the Dockers start to close the gap, and fast.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1993 State Of Origin. Probably the best State Of Origin the AFL has ever seen. Kernahan, Bradley and Platten take on Roos, Ablett and Frawley.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2016 Qualifying Final. Hawthorn and Geelong have been putting on classics for 30 years, and this one is no different, with a match that goes right down to, and beyond, the final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1980 Grand Final. Richmond v Collingwood. The biggest clubs meet on the biggest stage, and a legend is made as Kevin Bartlett saves his best for the last game of the year.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1993 Round 6. At one end - Gary Ablett Senior. At the other - Paul Salmon. Those two alone would kick 24 goals that day in one of the great shootouts in AFL history.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2015 Round 16. The first Showdown after the loss of Crows coach Phil Walsh, this match was a rollercoaster of emotion from start to finish between Adelaide and Port Adelaide.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1990 Qualifying Final. Magpie Peter Daicos did things with a footy no-one thought was possible. He goes deep into his bag of tricks against the Eagles to keep his premiership dream alive.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2012 Round 5. The Anzac Day clash between the Pies and the Bombers this year was an all-time great, as Dane Swan puts in a career game in front of a packed MCG.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2004 Preliminary Final. The Saints and the Power were a win away from a Grand Final - St Kilda's Fraser Gehrig kicked his 100th goal of the season mid-game which swung all the momentum.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2007 Elimination Final. Hawk Lance Franklin arrives as a genuine superstar, putting in a monster performance against the Crows on the September stage.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2019 Preliminary Final. Footy's newest club - GWS, against one of the oldest - Collingwood. The last 5 minutes is as tense and gripping as any final in recent memory.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2013 Qualifying Final. The Cats get a true home final, forcing the Dockers to play at their Geelong fortress. It was controversial, but Freo showed up and took it right up to Geelong from the first bounce.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2004 Round 3. James Hird is an icon, a legend of Essendon. Here he shows us why, with a performance in big moments that defined his career.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1997 Preliminary Final. Preliminary finals are often decided by the smallest of margins - and that was the case in 1997 between the Dogs and the Crows.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1995 Round 4. The first ever ANZAC Day game between the Pies and the Bombers, and still one of the best ever played. Saverio Rocca kicks a bag in a thriller.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2000 Round 21. Essendon went into this game undefeated, and seemingly unstoppable. But the Dogs tried something new - a 'flood' - to try and upset the raging flag favourites.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1970 Grand Final. The Pies were 44 points up against the Blues, and had one hand on the Premiership Cup. But Carlton weren't just going to hand the flag to their arch rival.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1984 Grand Final. Essendon and Hawthorn have spent generations hating each other, so when they meet on Grand Final day, all bets are off.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2014 Preliminary Final. The Hawks are looking for back-to-back Premierships, but they need to get past the Power first. Port Adelaide show that they can match it with the reigning premier on footy's biggest stage.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2013 Elimination Final. Before the Tigers were a flag-winning franchise, they stumbled in September time and time again. In 2013 they met the Blues, who fell into the finals but weren't going to waste their shot.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2011 Preliminary Final. The Pies were looking to go back-to-back, but Buddy and the Hawks had other plans. A prelim final with it all, including a finish no-one saw coming.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Two of the hottest teams clash in Geelong where the Suns will be looking for their first win at the venue.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Giants are coming off two wins and will host Port Adelaide after a bye and looking to break a string of losses.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Both teams see this as one to win; the Roos fresh off the bye and the Eagles riding high from impressing the competition last week.

programme.title: AFLW
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1993 Preliminary Final. The Crows had the Baby Bombers on the ropes to half time, before Kevin Sheedy's men click into gear in the second half.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2013 Round 13. The Miracle on Grass. The Cats were cruising at the Gabba, but the Lions never, ever gave up - coming from 7 goals down to having a chance to win.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2001 Round 16. The Kangaroos were 10 goals up, but the Bombers rolled up their sleeves and got to work, closing the gap all the way to the final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2002 Grand Final. The Lions were looking at back-to-back flags. The Pies for their first since 1990. This brutal Grand Final would go down as one of the best of the modern era.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2005 Semi Final. Geelong head to the SCG to face the Swans in a scrappy, tense affair before a one-man last-quarter clinic blindsides us all.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2017 Elimination Final. When the siren sounded, the Eagles and Power were tied. When the extra time siren sounded, they were tied. At the end of DOUBLE OVERTIME, they were still tied. It all hinges on a shot after the third final siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2008 Grand Final. The Cats at the peak of the powers against a Hawks side led by mastermind coach Alastair Clarkson, who called the Cats a 'shark' that couldn't breathe if it wasn't moving. A coaching move that started his legacy.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2009 Round 5. Anzac Day between the Bombers and the Pies. A wet afternoon at the G, it was a slog all day until David Zaharakis announced himself with seconds left in the game.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2009 Grand Final. The Saints and the Cats were far and away the best teams of '09. And thy put on one of the best Grand Finals - a brutal tussle that was only broken by moments of sheer brilliance.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2012 Grand Final. This Grand Final had it all. Massive hits, blistering runs and moments that have lived forever in footy folklore on a perfect day in September.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2009 Round 14. The Cats and the Saints put on what is considered the best home-and-away game ever played. Blistering and brutal from start to finish it's two powerhouse teams at their peak going at it from siren to siren.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2013 Preliminary Final. The Hawks and the Cats - all they do is play in blockbusters. This one is no different as they fight tooth and nail for a spot in the 2013 Grand Final.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1999 Preliminary Final. The Bombers and the Blues duke it out on the MCG for the right to play in a Grand Final. A match that has gone down in footy folklore thanks to that tackle.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2006 Grand Final. Sydney and West Coast put on a Grand Final for the ages in 2005, and the very next year they did it again - going toe-to-toe until the bitter end.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2010 Grand Final. The Pies and the Saints meet on footy's biggest stage and put on a game that no-one will ever forget, where the bounce of the ball changed footy forever.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2005 Grand Final. Sydney and West Coast play off as the Swans aim to break the longest premiership drought in the AFL - 72 years.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2016 Grand Final. The Bulldogs came from 7th to make a Grand Final in 2016, taking the hard road to face the Swans. Without their captain they must find one more big effort to break their premiership drought.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1989 Grand Final. Considered one of the best games ever played, this is a Grand Final everyone needs to watch at least once. Hits, hangers and highlights from start to finish in an old-school slugfest for a Premiership.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2016 Preliminary Final. The Giants and the Dogs have a short, but fierce rivalry. Player defections, dirty tactics and high-stakes matches fuelled the fire for this one which didn't disappoint.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 2018 Grand Final. West Coast v Collingwood put on a frenetic Grand Final that hung in the balance until the dying seconds. History hinged on the smallest moments all day in a match that might be the best we've seen in the modern era.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1994 Preliminary Final. The Roos and the Cats face off for a spot in the 1994 Grand Final. The game rests on Mick Martyn v Gary Ablett Senior in a match that goes right down to the wire.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1994 Round 7. The Swans and the Saints go at it in a see-sawing clash way back in 1994. The game's greatest goalkicker - Tony Lockett - has a game for the ages as he tries to drag his Saints over the line.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1996 Preliminary Final. A Grand Final spot is on the line when the Bombers head to the SCG to take on the Swans. A brutal game that goes right down to the wire.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1986 Elimination Final. Fitzroy's last finals series before merging with Brisbane, the Roy Boys put on a farewell show for the ages against Bombers in front of 60,000 fans.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A group of prospectors search for gold in some of Australia's most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as they seek their fortune.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A group of prospectors search for gold in some of Australia's most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as they seek their fortune.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum goes for a hole-in-one when a signed Jack Nicklaus golf glove swings into the shop; Corey targets a GI Joe Tomahawk helicopter toy; an antique Fender amp rocks Chum's world.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Fern Brady complains about being forced to tidy up, while Dara O Briain shows off a fab flair for folding.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In small towns and along America's back roads, treasures are waiting to be uncovered, valuable relics from history that are hidden in junk piles, buried in barns, and stacked in garages. It takes special experts to find these lost artefacts and hopefully turn rust to riches. Follow two of the most skilled 'pickers' - Mike Wolfe, owner of Antique Archaeology, and his business partner, Frank Fritz - as they hunt down objects with historical, collectible, and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners. Along the way, they meet people whose own stories open a window into American lives and history.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: Trevor is set to finish early for the year; Chris, nearing the end of the season, begins pulling up his nets until a phone call puts his entire season back on the ice; the Husavik Crew race to reach their quota.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick Dale, one of Pawn Stars' most popular experts, runs Las Vegas based Rick's Restorations, a family business that finds, restores and upcycles cool objects ranging from Cadillacs to Coke Machines. The before and after reveals of his work are always highlights, in part because of the history nuggets Rick Dale shares about each object, whether it's a barber chair or a gas pump. In this spinoff series, featuring the dynamic characters at Rick's workplace, viewers will watch a variety of objects be bought, bartered and transformed, learning the process of restoration; how do you duplicate Coke machine red? Where can you find 1920s tires? A storyteller who works with tools instead of a pen, Rick shares when and why objects were invented, who used them and how fixing or transforming them changes their value.

programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Gym fails, awful dancing and natural selection gone wrong feature, with slope reports from Tristram Ponsonby Crum and DJ Steve's musical mix.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We take a break from all things wheel-related and observe the antics of some Pedestrians before once again spending a couple of relaxing minutes being all judgemental in Identify The Idiot.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Ghosts of former prisoners make a woman's jailhouse ghost tours a little too scary. A woman is brutally attacked by a spirit lurking in her historic home. A family doing renovations unleashes ghosts.

programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Clueless holidaymakers and slapstick skiing top the fails. Claus Autobah delivers German news in this absurd mix of antics.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick Dale, one of Pawn Stars' most popular experts, runs Las Vegas based Rick's Restorations, a family business that finds, restores and upcycles cool objects ranging from Cadillacs to Coke Machines. The before and after reveals of his work are always highlights, in part because of the history nuggets Rick Dale shares about each object, whether it's a barber chair or a gas pump. In this spinoff series, featuring the dynamic characters at Rick's workplace, viewers will watch a variety of objects be bought, bartered and transformed, learning the process of restoration; how do you duplicate Coke machine red? Where can you find 1920s tires? A storyteller who works with tools instead of a pen, Rick shares when and why objects were invented, who used them and how fixing or transforming them changes their value.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum gets his hands on a trio of vintage comic strip characters, and a seller plays with his emotions to toy around with the deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick is ready for some football when a Super Bowl bucket hat rushes into the shop; Spencer brings in an Incredible Hulk comic book; a set of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs pencil holders interest Corey.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tackling the toughest roads and heaviest loads, Outback Truckers is back for an exciting 6th season! Facing extremes of drought ravaged land to rain drenched roads that leave you stranded for days, these determined truckers battle the elements on every job they do.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tackling the toughest roads and heaviest loads, Outback Truckers is back for an exciting 6th season! Facing extremes of drought ravaged land to rain drenched roads that leave you stranded for days, these determined truckers battle the elements on every job they do.

programme.title: Black Ops
programme.desc: Dom and Kay join the Met Police in the hope of cleaning up their community but are thrust into the murky world of deep cover infiltration as they become part of a criminal enterprise.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: Host Jon Stewart sits down with United States Senator Mark Kelly of Arizona.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum gets his hands on a trio of vintage comic strip characters, and a seller plays with his emotions to toy around with the deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick is ready for some football when a Super Bowl bucket hat rushes into the shop; Spencer brings in an Incredible Hulk comic book; a set of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs pencil holders interest Corey.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Sarah Millican gets her hands in some cottage pie, and Fern Brady is introduced as Brandy Alexander.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In small towns and along America's back roads, treasures are waiting to be uncovered, valuable relics from history that are hidden in junk piles, buried in barns, and stacked in garages. It takes special experts to find these lost artefacts and hopefully turn rust to riches. Follow two of the most skilled 'pickers' - Mike Wolfe, owner of Antique Archaeology, and his business partner, Frank Fritz - as they hunt down objects with historical, collectible, and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners. Along the way, they meet people whose own stories open a window into American lives and history.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by taking a look at some car crashes through The Eye In The Sky, before once more getting all judgemental on our drivers by Identifying The Idiot.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: A woman is horrified to discover restless souls buried in the cemetery next to her house; when a man digs up an old tombstone in his yard, he unwittingly unearths a violent entity.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In Idaho, Kidd and Harry Youren use explosives to battle a deep freeze to protect their cattle's drinking supply. In Montana, Jake Herak's young pups learn a big lesson in Lion hunting. Meanwhile in Wyoming, Josh Kirk takes aim at a pack of Coyotes messing with his Bison. In Alaska, A violent winter storm leaves Mike Horstman's fishing boat high and dry. Eustace Conway digs deep into the hillside to build a greenhouse for Turtle Island.

programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Fails include business blunders and old age mishaps. Rummy Talker reports on road action, while Lonely Hearts seeks a match for Spencer.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Nina meet some hungry kids who are Sneaking Snacks, encounter pets that refuse to give their owners alone time in Bathroom Pets, and drink Some Rum.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Rosie Jones feels badly let down by her comedy hero Jack Dee, while Babatunde Aleshe shouts about a fortune cookie. And Andy Zaltzman predicts the end of the world.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin takes a seat along with Barry and Kenny to talk pigeons, turtles and the secrets of making a living as a storage buyer; the casts recount the craziest things they've ever heard Laura say and share their worst locker buying experiences.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Packed with dramatic bidding, intense rivalries and quirky personalities, follow treasure hunters Darrell, Brandon, Jarrod, and Brandi as they seek to score big in the high-stakes world of storage auctions.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, the Traffic Cops target criminals moving across force areas to commit crimes.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the dead of night in Longreach north Queensland, long distance cattle transporters David and Kylie Hornick have hit trouble. They've have already carted 800 cattle 700 kilometres to get to Longreach and have another 300 kilometres to go, but a breakdown is causing headaches. In the Gibson desert, Slick's progress to get home for Christmas has been dashed by a herd of wild camels, putting him behind schedule. Tomorrow he'll have to push harder but in a thirty year old truck, this road is a dangerous place to be making up time. Anthony and Danyelle Haigh tackle a dangerous river crossing on the search for elusive liquid gold - water.

programme.title: Hotel Portofino
programme.desc: Bella devises a plan to thwart Cecil's intentions to take control of the hotel; Bella also wants to help get Nish safe and to save Lucian and Rose's marriage.

programme.desc: Australia's notorious bank robber Brenden Abbott and son James face a life shaped by crime escapes and prison as James fights for his father's freedom and a real relationship.

channel.display-name: [Optus TV feat. Foxtel] Family HD / MO7

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vegie-eating boys are back. Three veggies serve as 'cabin boys' at a pirate-themed dinner theatre, where they long to move from table service to the stage show, but their incompetence, laziness and cowardice get in the way. But when a princess drags them into the 17th century to rescue her brother, who's been kidnapped by a nefarious pirate with designs on her kingdom, they have to overcome their issues and become heroes.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families: A Gift from Freya
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Travel back to the stone-age in this big-budget treatment of the world's favourite prehistoric family! Fred Flintstone, a put-upon blue-collar worker struggling to squeak by, with the help of his best buddy Barney and his wife Wilma. After an aptitude test mix up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Slate & Company Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. But there's trouble brewing in Bedrock: An evil executive and his sinister secretary are now plotting to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure. The pair quickly become best buddies - and partners in crime - pickpocketing their way out of poverty and quickly believing they are the real cats' whiskers! Setting their sights higher, Top Cat and Benny hatch a plan to steal diamonds from crime boss Mr Big. Along the way, our heroes meet fellow alley cats Choo Choo, Fancy-Fancy and Brain, and together they're a formidable bunch. However, when Mr Big catches up with them and captures Top Cat, can his new friends save the day?

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Part husky, part wolf, Balto doesn't know where he belongs. He's an outcast in Alaska, except to his true friends - Boris, the Russian snow goose, polar bear cubs Muk and Luk, and the beautiful husky, Jenna. Even though he's different, all of Balto's friends recognise what he still can't see himself: his noble spirit. One day, a serious diphtheria epidemic spreads fast among the children of Nome. When a fierce blizzard closes off all routes of transport, there's no way to obtain lifesaving medicine - unless a team of sled dogs can race 965km through the blinding Arctic storm and bring back anti-toxin. But when the dogs get lost in the frozen wilderness, only Balto can rescue the team and save the children.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: When California girl Susan Murphy is clobbered by space gunk on her wedding day, she mysteriously grows to 49-feet-11-inches tall. The military puts her into a secret government compound, renamed Ginormica and hold her captive along with a ragtag group of Monsters: the brilliant but insect-headed Dr Cockroach, Ph.D.; the macho half-ape, half-fish, The Missing Link; the gelatinous and indestructible B.O.B.; and the 350-foot grub, Insectosaurus. But when a wild and dangerous alien robot lands on Earth, The President enlists this motley crew to save the world from imminent destruction.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Our friendly neighbourhood Super Hero decides to join his best friends Ned, MJ, and the rest of the gang on a European vacation. However, Peter's plan to leave super heroics behind for a few weeks are quickly scrapped when he begrudgingly agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent!

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: When Shaun decides to take the day off and have some fun, he gets a little more action than he bargained for. A mix-up with the Farmer, a caravan, and a very steep hill leads them all to the Big City, and it's up to Shaun to return everyone safely home.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: Fall in love with the big-hearted, wet-nosed star of this outrageous comedy. With nefarious dognappers hot on his heels, an adorable puppy named Beethoven adopts the unsuspecting Newton family and promptly grows up into 185 pounds of romping, drooling, disaster-prone St Bernard. George is the none-too-thrilled father whose disdain for the cuddly canine turns to loyalty after Beethoven becomes the target of unspeakable animal experimentation. Now it's up to George to save the day in this fetching adventure that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Part husky, part wolf, Balto doesn't know where he belongs. He's an outcast in Alaska, except to his true friends - Boris, the Russian snow goose, polar bear cubs Muk and Luk, and the beautiful husky, Jenna. Even though he's different, all of Balto's friends recognise what he still can't see himself: his noble spirit. One day, a serious diphtheria epidemic spreads fast among the children of Nome. When a fierce blizzard closes off all routes of transport, there's no way to obtain lifesaving medicine - unless a team of sled dogs can race 965km through the blinding Arctic storm and bring back anti-toxin. But when the dogs get lost in the frozen wilderness, only Balto can rescue the team and save the children.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: Nerdy college student Columbus has survived the plague that has turned mankind into flesh-devouring zombies because he's scared of just about everything. Gun-toting, Twinkie-loving Tallahassee has no fears. Together, they are about to stare down their most horrifying challenge yet: each other's company.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old Billy Madison must repeat all 12 grades of school in just 24 weeks to earn his father's respect, and prove he has what it takes to run the family's multimillion-dollar empire. Along the way, Billy falls for his third grade teacher, gets kicked out of school and must face off with his nemesis, not to mention a pesky penguin.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: Get ready for a gut-busting, bone-mashing good time in this hilarious horror comedy. There comes a day in every man's life when he has to get off the couch and kill some zombies. When flesh-eating zombies are on the hunt for a bite to eat, it's up to slacker Shaun and his best pal to save their friends and family from becoming the next entree.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Clear the runway for Derek Zoolander, VH1's three-time male model of the year but his face falls when hippie-chic 'he's so hot right now' Hansel scooters in to steal this year's award. The evil fashion guru Mugatu seizes the opportunity to turn Derek into a killing machine. It's a well-designed conspiracy and only with the help of Hansel and a few well-chosen accessories can Derek make the world safe.

programme.title: Land of the Lost
programme.desc: A has-been scientist, Dr Rick Marshall, gets more than he bargained for when his expedition takes a wrong turn into the Land of the Lost. Now, Marshall, his crack-smart research assistant, Holly, and a redneck survivalist named Will have no weapons, few skills and questionable smarts to survive in a world full of marauding dinosaurs, fantastic creatures and laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: Nerdy college student Columbus has survived the plague that has turned mankind into flesh-devouring zombies because he's scared of just about everything. Gun-toting, Twinkie-loving Tallahassee has no fears. Together, they are about to stare down their most horrifying challenge yet: each other's company.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High

programme.title: Land of the Lost

Now, Marshall, his crack-smart research assistant, Holly, and a redneck survivalist named Will have no weapons, few skills and questionable smarts to survive in a world full of marauding dinosaurs, fantastic creatures and laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, this group of awesome nerds will come together to make some music, and some questionable decisions, one last time.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. What ensues is comic mayhem wherein the process of uncovering lies only begets more lies.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five former basketball teammates, after 30 years since graduating high school, gather at the lake house where they celebrated their biggest victory to mourn the passing of their late coach. Over the course of the Fourth of July weekend, the five friends realise that just because they've all grown up and started families doesn't mean that they've lost that old spark. Adulthood is what you make of it, and no one at the lake house is eager to be the grown up of the gang.

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: The Zohan is the finest counterterrorist agent the Israeli army has. That is, until he fakes his death and travels to Manhattan to live his dream as a hairdresser. Now this skilled fighting machine who used to clip bad guys is out to prove he can make the cut as a top stylist. All goes silky smooth until his cover is blown when he's recognised by a Palestinian cab driver. Now, the Zohan must fight to live a peaceful new life in New York in this razor-sharp action-packed comedy.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: In this outrageous slapstick comedy funny-men Rob Schneider, David Spade and Jon Heder star as three older guys with little sporting ability, who spent a lot of time on the bench when they were kids. Now they have a second chance to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams when they take on a squad of Little League baseball bullies. Striking a blow for the athletically-challenged they soon become unlikely heroes to the bullied, clumsy and awkward and an inspiration to benchwarmers everywhere.
